title: Invisible Armor
description: A simple Texture Pack for you if you dont like armor Texture at all!
body:
# Invisible Armor Texture Pack Description
This texture pack makes all armor completely invisible while keeping the player's appearance clean and untouched. Ideal for those who prefer a more immersive experience or want to show off their custom skins without bulky armor covering the details. While the armor is invisible, all its stats and protection remain fully functional. Perfect for PvP, roleplay, or creative builds where aesthetics matter!
